summary: Fixed 2 compilation errors in integration tests caused by private module access. Changed `billforge_core::domain::vendor::VendorType` to `billforge_core::VendorType` and `billforge_core::domain::workflow::ApprovalStatus` to `billforge_core::ApprovalStatus`. All 12 tests pass, 4 ignored (require live DB).
decisions_made: Used re-exported types from billforge_core root (pub use domain::*) instead of accessing private submodules directly
